title: 狐の旅路
description:
This game doesn't have an English version yet. We may do the English translations in the future, but it will be next year. 

Shirakami Fubuki is a virtual fox girl endorsed by hololive. One day, her friend, Natsuiro Matsuri, asked her to come to play a tabletop role-playing game with other hololive members. However, the game turned into reality, Fubuki and her friend being involved in a different world and losing their memories. She needs to find her memory, discover the truth of the world, and lead her friend back to the original world.

This game is a fangame based on the virtual Youtuber of hololive. The game has a story flow for about one hour, with certain decryption and exploration elements. This work mainly faces the fans of hololive, so there are a lot of NETA and memes in the game.characterShirakami Fubuki
A virtual female high school girl with white hair and fox ears. 
Although she claims to be a fox, she often meows unconsciously.
Natsuiro Matsuri
Virtual high school students who are the friend with Fubuki. She has a special interest in girls.
Ookami Mio
The girl with black hair, wolf ear. She is a childhood sweetheart of Fubuki. She is reliable as a companion, but she is very timid.
Minato Aqua
Virtual maid wear in a Navy maid's uniform. She has been working hard but she is very bold.
Nakiri Ayame
She is a Japanese ghost, who has a delicate girlish heart.
Oozora Subaru
A Virtual manager of the virtual sports department. She is hard-working, and often to encourage companions with her vitality and enthusiasm. It has a good relationship with Ayame.

Discord for reply bug:
description_short: The white hair fox girl, Shirakami Fubuki, will take an adventure in a different world with her companions.
